title: activate_subscription_atomic unconditionally overwrites expires_at, downgrading longer subscriptions
description: INSERT INTO subscriptions ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET expires_at = excluded.expires_at unconditionally overwrites. If user has subscription expiring 2026-06-01 and pays a second invoice expiring 2026-05-01 (shorter duration or past-dated), the activation overwrites the longer expiry with the shorter one, effectively cancelling paid time. Should use MAX(excluded.expires_at, subscriptions.expires_at) semantics.
